name: Enchanting
effect: Increase the production of Enchanted Fields (Farms) based on mana produced this Era.
formula: (1.2 * x^0.8)%, where x = mana produced this Era

name: Channeling
effect: Increase the production of all other buildings by 160% per Heaven's Domain built.
formula: ×160% per Heaven's Domain built

name: Vacuumancy
effect: Increase Maximum Mana and Mana Regeneration based on time spent this Era.
formula: Max Mana: +(7 * x^0.7); Mana Regen: +(0.4 * x^0.6); x = time this Era

name: Conjuration
effect: Each spell cast also casts free Tax Collections based on Goblin Banks owned. Also increases offline spell cast amount multiplicatively by 150%.
formula: floor((x / 600)^0.9), where x = Goblin Banks owned

name: Mysticism
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on Research Points.
formula: +(2.5 * x^0.5), where x = Research Points

name: Augmentation
effect: Increase the production of Unique Buildings based on Maximum Mana.
formula: round(2 * x^0.8)%, where x = Maximum Mana

name: Pyromancy
effect: Increase the production of the two highest building tiers based on Mana Regeneration.
formula: (10 * x^0.6)%, where x = Mana Regeneration

name: Empowered Luck
effect: Each time Elven Luck triggers, increase production of all buildings based on clicks this Era for 20 seconds. Increase Elven Luck autoclick chance by +24% (+1% manual).
formula: (5000 * x^0.25)%, where x = clicks this Era

name: Incantation
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Mana Regeneration.
formula: (50 + 3 * x^0.7)%, where x = Mana Regeneration

name: Cryomancy
effect: Increase Spell Duration based on mana produced this Era.
formula: (5 * ln(1+x)^1.5)%, where x = mana produced this Era

name: Projection
requirement: 200 Spiritual Surge (Total this R), Research Channeling (S10) & Incantation (S180)
effect: While Spiritual Surge is active, increase production of all buildings based on active spells.
formula: (100 * (10 * x)^y)%, where x = active spells, y = Spiritual Surge tier

name: Necromancy
effect: Increase the production of assistants based on Necropolises owned.
formula: round(5 * x^0.75)%, where x = Necropolises owned

name: Aeromancy
effect: Increase the production of Unique Buildings based on mana produced this Era.
formula: round(0.5 * x^0.58)%, where x = mana produced this Era

name: Assimilation
requirement: Secrets of the Ancients as Faceless
effect: Increase the production of Sunken Cities (Labyrinths) based on time spent as non-Faceless factions this Reincarnation.
formula: (80 + 0.8 * x^0.8)%, where x = non-Faceless time this Reincarnation

name: Runecarving
effect: Increase the production of all buildings based on Gems owned.
formula: (1.25 * log10(1+x)^1.25)%, where x = Gems owned

name: Chain Lightning
effect: While Lightning Strike is active, increase production of all non-target buildings based on Lightning Strike activity time this Era.
formula: (25 * x^0.9)%, where x = Lightning Strike activity time this Era

name: Mesmerization
effect: Increase production of all buildings by a fraction of your Offline Production Bonus.
formula: (ln(1+x)^2.5)%, where x = offline production bonus multiplier

name: Reverberation
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on active spells (minimum 3 active spells required).
formula: (3000 * 2^(x-3))%, where x = active spells (capped at 300)

name: Illusion
effect: Brainwave progressively grants more assistants over its duration.
formula: +(1 + 0.25 * (x+y)^1.5), where x = brainwave runtime (min), y = headstart (min)

name: Capacity
effect: Artifacts and trophies count more based on the highest amount of spells cast this Reincarnation.
formula: (ln(1+x)^1.5)%, where x = highest spells cast this Reincarnation

name: Spellbinding
requirement: 1 hour Combo Strike activity time (This Game)
effect: Call to Arms counts more buildings based on offline time this Reincarnation. Also increase offline production based on Combo Strike activity time this Reincarnation.
formula: CtA: (100 + 3*x^0.9)%; Offline: (1.2*x^0.8)%; x = offline/Combo Strike time this R

name: Focus
effect: Increase production bonus from Gems based on Faction spells activity time this Era.
formula: +(1.2 * x^0.6), where x = total Faction spells activity time this Era

name: Heirlooms
effect: Increase Maximum Mana and Mana Regeneration based on artifacts owned.
formula: Max Mana: +(75 * x^1.1); Mana Regen: +(5 * x^1.05); x = artifacts found

name: Hierarchy
effect: Increase production of buildings based on mana produced this Era. Better bonuses for lower tiers.
formula: (0.1 * x^0.45 * (12-T)^2)%, where x = mana produced this Era, T = building tier

name: Trickery
requirement: 200 Dwarf Exchanges as Dwairy (This Game), Research Mysticism (S105) & Illusion (S375)
effect: Increase production of Neutral buildings based on Maximum Mana.
formula: (0.5 * x^0.9)%, where x = Maximum Mana

name: Sequence
effect: Reduce spell cost scaling for higher spell tiers. Reduces cost multiplier by 0.1 for Normal Spells, 0.5 for Extraordinary Spells.

name: Spellstorm
requirement: Research S435, C1325, any Neutral or Dragon
effect: Increase production of Unique buildings based on duration of your longest spell.
formula: (2.5 * x^0.85)%, where x = longest spell duration

name: Psionics
requirement: 5,000 Base Assistants, Research S545 & E1325, as Faceless or Dragon
effect: Increase triggered Tax Collections based on assistants owned.
formula: +(1 + 0.25 * ln(1+x)^1.25), where x = assistants owned

name: Scholarship
effect: Increase production of Non-Unique buildings based on Unique buildings built.
formula: (10 * x^1.05)%, where x = Unique Buildings built

name: Manipulation
requirement: 1e9 Tax Collections (This R), Research Calefaction (A1325) & Psionics (S1500)
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration by 12% per active spell. Also increases offline spell cast amount multiplicatively by 1200%.
formula: (12 * x)%, where x = active spells
